public String toString() {
        return "MoneyAmountStyle['"
                + getZeroCharacter()
                + "','"
                + getPositiveSignCharacter()
                + "','"
                + getNegativeSignCharacter()
                + "','"
                + getDecimalPointCharacter()
                + "','"
                + getGroupingStyle()
                + ","
                + getGroupingCharacter()
                + "','"
                + getGroupingSize()
                + "',"
                + isForcedDecimalPoint()
                + "',"
                + isAbsValue()
                + "]";
    }
